# kSecAttrAccount

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a string indicating the item’s account name.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrAccount: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFString] and contains an account name. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassGenericPassword] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassInternetPassword] have this attribute.
